title: 04 tina revealed as part of the miniature
prompt: Use case: compositing. Asset type: cinematic storyboard reveal frame. Image 1 controls Tina's identity, wardrobe, product, car, and giant hand. Image 2 controls the detailed tactile miniature neighborhood language. Cut wide and reveal the entire residential block as a beautifully made tabletop-scale world resting in one enormous open palm. Tina remains a real living person seated safely in the peeled-open back of the tiny blue-gray car, still holding the glowing lychee gummy and pink Peelerz bag. The other giant hand holds the car's removed outer skin as one curled, translucent blue-gray peel. Houses, sprinklers, trees, and moving cars continue calmly at tiny scale. The unseen giant is a benevolent observer. Natural late-afternoon light, awe without peril.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one frame from a coherent live-action Peelerz commercial sequence. Maintain Tina as the same young woman with long brown hair, blue jacket, black top, pink lychee gummy, and pink Peelerz package. Photoreal cinematic advertising, real suburban textures, gentle deadpan wonder. The giant hand is warm, careful, and curious rather than threatening. One precise scale rule, no destruction, panic, horror, cartoon style, captions, panel borders, watermarks, or generic candyland.
